case_title: CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE VS. JOHN STOCKDALE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,537.00 FILED BY CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE AS TO DEFENDANT STOCKDALE, JOHN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-27-2024 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-27-2024 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO MAR-28-2024 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY LUIS VILLALOBOS. DEFENDANT JOHN STOCKDALE IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: LAUREN KRAMER SUJEETH; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $122.50 SERVED JAN-03-2024, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT STOCKDALE, JOHN

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY LUIS VILLALOBOS. DEFENDANT JOHN STOCKDALE IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF APPEARED AND STATED THEY HAVE BEEN PAID IN FULL AND WOULD LIKE THE CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JAMES CHANG; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
